meta.homeTitle: Guest House Akutsa | Family Guesthouse in Keda, Adjara, Georgia
meta.homeDescription: Family guesthouse, private cottage and stationary camper in Sofel Akutsa, Keda Municipality, Adjara. Mountain views, home-cooked breakfast, and warm Georgian hospitality.

footer.tagline: Family hospitality in the heart of Adjara's mountains.
footer.address: Sofel Akutsa, Keda Municipality, Adjara, Georgia

home.heroTitle: A Family Welcome in the Mountains of Adjara
home.heroSubtitle: Guest House Akutsa offers cozy rooms, a private cottage, and a fully equipped camper — all surrounded by forests, rivers, and Georgian hospitality.
home.introText: Tucked in the village of Sofel Akutsa, just 3 km from Keda center, our family-run property offers three distinct ways to experience the Adjara highlands: a traditional guesthouse, a private cottage with panoramic views, and a stationary camper for a unique stay. Wake up to mountain air, enjoy a home-cooked breakfast, and let us help you discover the wonders of the region.
home.stayOptionsSubtitle: Three unique ways to experience Akutsa
home.attractionsSubtitle: Explore the natural and cultural treasures of Adjara
home.ctaSubtitle: Reach out to us directly on Telegram or WhatsApp — fast replies, no booking fees.

guesthouse.name: Guest House Akutsa
guesthouse.short: 4 cozy rooms, shared kitchen, two balconies and a spacious terrace with mountain views.

cottage.name: Panorama Akutsa
cottage.short: A private 20 sqm cottage with its own kitchen, bathroom and balcony overlooking the valley.

camper.name: Akutsa Camper
camper.short: A stationary, fully equipped house truck for a unique and cozy escape.

guesthousePage.title: Guest House Akutsa
guesthousePage.subtitle: Family rooms with shared kitchen and stunning views
guesthousePage.description: Guest House Akutsa is our main family house, offering 4 comfortable rooms — a mix of family and standard rooms — designed for guests who enjoy a homely atmosphere. The house features two balconies and a generous 60 sqm terrace where guests gather for breakfast, coffee, or evening conversations under the stars. The shared kitchen and bathroom encourage a warm, communal stay, just like visiting family.
guesthousePage.room1Desc: Spacious room ideal for families, with comfortable bedding and balcony access.
guesthousePage.room2Desc: Cozy double room with mountain views, perfect for couples or solo travelers.

cottagePage.title: Panorama Akutsa
cottagePage.subtitle: Your private escape with panoramic mountain views
cottagePage.description: Panorama Akutsa is a private 20 sqm cottage built for travelers who want independence and tranquility. It comes with its own fully equipped kitchen, private bathroom, and a balcony where you can enjoy uninterrupted views over the Keda valley. Perfect for couples or small families seeking a quiet retreat away from the main house.

camperPage.title: Akutsa Camper
camperPage.subtitle: A unique stationary house truck experience
camperPage.description: The Akutsa Camper is a stationary, fully equipped house truck offering a one-of-a-kind stay. Combining the charm of camper life with the comfort of a real home, it's perfect for travelers looking for something different — surrounded by nature, yet just steps away from the main guesthouse.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need for a comfortable stay
services.breakfastDesc: Start your day with a traditional Georgian breakfast made from local, often homegrown ingredients — fresh bread, cheese, eggs, honey and more.
services.toursDesc: Let us arrange guided trips to Makhuntseti Waterfall, Goderdzi Pass, Batumi and other highlights of Adjara, tailored to your interests.
services.transferDesc: We can organize comfortable transfer from Batumi airport or city center directly to the guesthouse, and back.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse into life at Akutsa

attractions.title: Attractions Near Akutsa
attractions.subtitle: Discover the beauty of Adjara
attractions.waterfallDesc: A stunning 20-meter waterfall near an old arched stone bridge, one of Adjara's most beloved natural sites.
attractions.passDesc: A scenic mountain pass connecting Adjara to Samtskhe-Javakheti, famous for alpine landscapes and a ski resort.
attractions.batumiDesc: The vibrant Black Sea resort city with a boulevard, botanical garden, and lively nightlife.
attractions.seaDesc: Pebble beaches and seaside promenades along Georgia's stunning Black Sea coastline.
attractions.kedaDesc: The nearest town with shops, cafes, and local markets — perfect for a short visit.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.formNote: This form does not send automatically — please also reach us via Telegram or WhatsApp for the fastest response.
contact.address: Sofel Akutsa, Keda Municipality, Adjara, Georgia

reviews.review1Text: An incredible stay surrounded by nature. The family made us feel right at home and breakfast was unforgettable.
reviews.review2Text: The cottage was perfect for a quiet getaway — beautiful views and total privacy. Highly recommend!
reviews.review3Text: Staying in the camper was such a fun experience. Cozy, unique, and the hosts were incredibly welcoming.
